self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n   143→\n   144→    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n   145→        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n   146→                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n   147→\n   148→    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n   149→        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n   150→\n   151→    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n   152→        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n   153→\n   154→    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n   155→        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n   156→        ) and not      return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n   175→                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n   176→\n   177→    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n   178→        return f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n   274→                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n   275→\n   276→        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n   277→        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n   278→            raise_error()\n   279→\n   280→        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n   281→        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n   282→                                               and quantize_activations):\n   283→            raise_error()\n   284→\n   285→        mode = QuantMode(0)\n   286→\n   287→        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n   288→        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n   289→            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n   290→        elif quantize_weights:\n   291→            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n   292→\n   293→        # Do we quantize the activations?\n   294→        if       mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n   300→        if per_token:\n   301→            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n   302→        if per_group:\n   303→            mode = mode | quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n   434→\n   435→        return quant_mode\n   436→\n   437→    def to_dict(self):\n   438→        return {\n   439→            'use_smooth_quant':\n   440→ {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                      per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n                                       per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def                   f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return                           use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both     elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n \"\"\"\n    Context manager for file locking when loading pretrained configs.\n\n    This prevents race conditions when multiple processes try to download/load\n    the same model configuration            'kv_cache_quant_algo', None)\n            mixed_quant_configs = json_quant_configs.get(\n                'quantized_layers', None)\n            if (kv_quant_lhs := quant_config.kv_cache_quant_algo) is not None:\n                if kv_quant_lhs != kv_quant_rhs:\n                    raise RuntimeError(\n                        f\"The kvcache config in 'group_size', None)\n                mixed_quant_configs[layer] = config\n            layer_quant_config = mixed_quant_configs\n        elif quant_config.quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            if quant_config.group_size is None:\n                quant_config.group_size = 128\n\n        if moe_backend == 'TRTLLM' and quant_config.quant_algo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\" and not is_dynamic_quant:\n            if get_sm_version() >= 100:\n                if moe_backend == 'TRITON':\n                    return QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                else:\n                    return QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n            else:\n                return QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4\n        else:\n            return quant_algo\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def load_hf_quant_config(hf_quant_config, moe_backend):\n        quant_config = QuantConfig()\n        layer_quant_config = None\n\n        # Read exclude_modules from HF config if present (HF format module names)\n        hf_exclude_modules = hf_quant_config.get('modules_to_not_convert', None)\n\n        # DeepSeek V3 FP8 ckpt\n        if hf_quant_config.get(\"quant_method\") == \"fp8\" and hf_quant_config.get(\n                \"weight_block_size\", []):\n            quant_config.quant_algo = QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\n\n            block_size = hf_quant_config.get(\"weight_block_size\", [])\n            assert tuple(block_size) == (\n                128, 128), \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES only supports block_size=(128,128)\"\n            quant_config.group_size = block_size[0]\n\n            # Set default exclude_modules for FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\n            if moe_backend == 'TRTLLM':\n                default_exclude = [\"*kv_b_proj*\", \"*k_b_proj*\", \"*eh_proj\"]\n            else:\n                default_exclude = [\"*eh_proj\"]\n\n            # Merge HF config's modules_to_not_convert with default exclude_modules\n            if hf_exclude_modules is not None:\n                quant_config.exclude_modules = list(\n                    set(hf_exclude_modules + default_exclude))\n            else:\n                quant_config.exclude_modules = default_exclude\n        # MXFP4 checkpoints.\n        elif hf_quant_config.get(\"quant_method\") == \"mxfp4\":\n            quant_config.quant_algo = ModelConfig.get_mxfp4_quant_algo(\n                moe_backend)\n            quant_config.group_size = 32\n\n            # Default exclude_modules for MXFP4 (TRTLLM internal format)\n            default_exclude = [\n                'block.*.attn.out', 'block.*.mlp.gate', 'block.*.attn.qkv',\n                'embedding', 'unembedding'\n            ]\n\n            # Merge HF config's modules_to_not_convert with default exclude_modules\n            if hf_exclude_modules is not None:\n                quant_config.exclude_modules = list(\n                    set(hf_exclude_modules + default_exclude))\n            else:\n                quant_config.exclude_modules = default_exclude\n\n        # NOTE: This is for llm-compressor's quantized checkpoints.\n        elif hf_quant_config.get(\"quant_method\") == \"compressed-tensors\":\n            config_groups = hf_quant_config.get(\"config_groups\")\n            if config_groups is None:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"config_groups is not set in {hf_quant_config}.\")\n\n            weights_quant_config = config_groups[\"group_0\"][\"weights\"]\n            inputs_quant_config =
