final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_impl(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n        # Get top_k for routing (other routing parameters are extracted inside run_moe)\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n\n        run_post_quant_allgather = (self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n                                    and not self.enable_alltoall)\n        post_quant_comm = run_post_quant_allgather or self.enable_alltoall\n\n        x_sf = None\n        token_selected_experts = None\n        token_final_scales = None\n        token_count = x.shape[0]\n        alltoall_info = None\n        # Determine if this is first/last call (TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't use chunking)\n        is_first_call = self.repeat_idx == 0\n        is_last_call = self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1\n\n        if post_quant_comm:\n            self._load_balancer_start_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = self.routing_method.apply(\n                router_logits)\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_experts.to(torch.int32)\n            if token_final_scales is not None:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n\n            self._load_balancer_done_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            ignore_allreduce = self.enable_alltoall and self.alltoall_method_type in (\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided,\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided,\n            )\n            self._load_balancer_update_statistic(\n                token_selected_experts,\n                is_first_call,\n                is_last_call,\n                ignore_allreduce=ignore_allreduce)\n\n            # Route tokens to slots\n            token_selected_slots = self._load_balancer_route(\n                token_selected_experts, self.use_dp)\n\n            # Update expert statistics\n            ExpertStatistic.set_layer(self.layer_idx)\n            ExpertStatistic.maybe_add_info(self.num_slots, token_selected_slots)\n\n            # Use routed slots for subsequent processing\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_slots\n\n            x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            assert all_rank_num_tokens is not None, \"all_rank_num_tokens required for alltoall\"\n\n            runtime_max_tokens_per_rank = max(\n                all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else token_count\n\n            if token_final_scales is None:\n                token_final_scales = torch.ones_like(token_selected_experts,\n                                                     dtype=torch.float32)\n            else:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.float32)\n\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                assert self.alltoall_prepare_workspace is not None, \"alltoall_prepare_workspace should be initialized\"\n                if is_last_call:\n    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    self.alltoall_prepare_workspace,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size,\n                    self.num_experts,\n                    self.num_slots,\n                    top_k,\n                )\n                if gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info.view(\n                        (self.mapping.moe_ep_size, self.num_experts))\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv(\n                    [x, x_sf, token_final_scales_recv.shape[-1])\n\n                if token_final_scales is not None:\n                    token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n            else:\n router_logits=router_logits_arg,\n            do_finalize=do_finalize,\n            moe_output=moe_output,\n        )\n\n        self._load_balancer_start_set_cpu_stage(is_last_call)\n\n        # Combine results if using alltoall\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                if alltoall_info is not None:\n self.alltoall_workspace,\n                        ep_rank=self.ep_rank,\n                        ep_size=self.ep_size,\n                        top_k=top_k,\n so any necessary AllReduce operations must be added explicitly in the model definition.\n    AttentionDP should be turned off for min-latency mode.\n\n    When we have redundant expert, we have more weight slots than `num_experts`, in that case, we separate the concepts of expert and slot.\n    Expert is the concept from model's perspective while slot is the concept from model engine's perspective.\n    There should be at lease `num_experts` slots in the model engine. More than that is OK, in that case, some experts may have multiple replicas.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Supported quantization algorithms for TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\n    _SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS = {\n        QuantAlgo.NVFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n    }\n\n    # Quantization algorithms that support gptoss_style\n    _GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS = {\n        QuantAlgo.NVFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n    }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def can_implement(\n        cls,\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo],\n        dtype_activation: torch.dtype = torch.bfloat16,\n        gptoss_style: bool = False,\n    ) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if TRTLLMGenFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.\n\n        TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports SM in {100, 103} and the following quantizations:\n        - NVFP4\n        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\n        - W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n        - W4A16_MXFP4\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        Does NOT support unquantized mode. ValueError(f\"Unsupported activation type: {activation_type}\")\n\n    def select_alltoall_method_type(self) -> AlltoallMethodType:\n        # If no attention DP, no need to use AlltoAll.\n        if self.mapping.dp_size == 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        # AlltoAll cannot support MoE TP.\n        if self.mapping.moe_tp_size != 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        if not MnnvlMemory.supports_mnnvl():\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        all2all_method_type = AlltoallMethodType.DeepEP,\n                    AlltoallMethodType.DeepEPLowLatency\n            ]:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    \"DeepEP and DeepEPLowLatency are not supported for CutlassFusedMoE yet\"\n                )\n            return AlltoallMethodType[all2all_method_type]\n\n        # We found that NVLinkOneSided performs better than NCCL AllGather/ReduceScatter,\n        # regardless of the relationship between EP size and topK. if self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_any_quant(\n                exclude_kv_cache=True):\n            if self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales():\n                return DeepSeekFP8BlockScalesFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_nvfp4():\n                return NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod(\n                ) if self.swiglu_alpha is not None or self.activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2 else NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEBaseMethod(\n                )\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():\n                return W4A16MXFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8NVFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unsupported quantization method by TRTLLMGenFusedMoE: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n                )\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't support fp16/bf16/fp32 MoE.\")\n\n    def create_weights(self):\n        if self._weights_created:\n            return\n\n        self.quant_method = self._get_quant_method()\n        self.quant_method.create_weights(self)\n\n        self._weights_created = True\n        self._check_configs()\n\n        if (self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8) and not self.bias:\n            self.w3_w1_bias = def load_weights(self,\n                     weights: List[Dict],\n                     allow_partial_loading: bool = False):\n        assert self._weights_created\n\n        assert len(weights) == 1\n        weights = weights[0]\n\n        kargs = {}\n        if \"allow_partial_loading\" in inspect.getfullargspec(\n                self.quant_method.load_weights).args:\n post_load_weights(self):\n        self.quant_method.post_load_weights(self)\n\n    def quantize_input(self, x, post_quant_comm: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"Quantize inputs prior to post-communication (alltoall/allgather) or before MoE computation.\n\n        Args:\n            x: Input tensor to quantize\n            post_quant_comm:\n                If True, quantize for post-quant communication path.\n                If False, quantize for non-communication path\n\n        Returns: (x, x_sf) where x_sf is already reshaped to 2D if needed\n\n        For quantization methods that produce scaling factors:\n        - x_sf is reshaped from 1D to 2D: [num_elements] -> [batch_size, ceil_div(hidden_size, scaling_vector_size)]\n        - The 2D shape is required for proper handling in alltoall/allgather operations\n        - scaling_vector_size is typically the group size for block-wise quantization\n        \"\"\"\n        x_sf = None\n        if self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n            if post_quant_comm:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_dequant[0])\n            else:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_gate_dequant[0])\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            if isinstance(x, Fp4QuantizedTensor):\n                assert not x.is_sf_swizzled, \"Fp4QuantizedTensor should not be swizzled before communication\"\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = x.fp4_tensor, x.scaling_factor\n            else:\n                # Apply pre_quant_scale if it exists (for NVFP4_AWQ)\n                # fc31_act_scale shape: (1, hidden_size)\n                # x shape: (num_tokens, hidden_size)\n                if hasattr(\n                        self,\n                        'fc31_act_scale') and self.fc31_act_scale is not None:\n                    x = x * self.fc31_act_scale\n\n                pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n                if pad_size > 0:\n                    x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_scale, self.scaling_vector_size, False,\n                    False)\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.mxfp8_quantize(\n                x, False, alignment=self.quant_method.input_hidden_alignment)\n            x_row, x_col = x.shape[0], x.shape[1]\n        elif self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n            # For SM100+, fp8_quantize_1x128 returns x_sf with shape (blocked_n, num_tokens),\n            # but moe_a2a_dispatch requires all payloads to have first dim = num_tokens.\n            # Transpose x_sf before dispatch and transpose back after receive, but this may\n            # introduce perf regression. So we don't supports post_quant_comm for fp8_block_scales.\n            # TODO: Consider remove the constraint of the OneSided AlltoAll\n            pass\n        elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n        elif self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                x, 1.0 / self.fc31_input_scale)\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(\n                f\"unsupported quantization mode for post communication: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n            )\n\n        if x_sf is not None:\n            x_sf = x_sf.view(x_row, -1)\n\n        return x, x_sf\n\n    def supports_moe_output_in_alltoall_workspace(self):\n        return self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8\n\n    def run_moe(\n        self,\n        x: torch.Tensor,\n        token_selected_experts: torch.Tensor,\n        token_final_scales: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n        x_sf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        router_logits: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, tuple]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Run MoE computation with TRTLLMGen backend.\n\n        This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different\n        quantization schemes (fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_nvfp4_fp8,\n        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).\n\n        Args:\n            # Standard MoE interface parameters:\n            x: Input hidden states (may be pre-quantized)\n            token_selected_experts: Expert IDs [num_tokens, top_k]. If EPLB is enabled,\n                                    this represents expert slots [num_tokens, top_k] instead.\n            token_final_scales: Final scaling factors for each token\n            x_sf: Input scale factors (optional, for certain quantization schemes)\n\n            # TRTLLMGen-specific additional parameters:\n            router_logits: Router logits for integrated routing in some kernels.\n                          Should be None if routing has already been done (e.g., post_quant_comm).\n            do_finalize: Whether to finalize the output. If False, returns intermediate\n                        results (tuple) for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8 schemes.\n            moe_output: Pre-allocated output buffer from workspace (optional).\n                       Used for mnnvlthroughput alltoall backend to avoid extra copies.\n\n        Returns:\n            If do_finalize=True: final_hidden_states tensor\n            If do_finalize=False: tuple of intermediate outputs (for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8)\n        \"\"\"\n        # Extract routing parameters from routing_method\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            factor = 1 if self.activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2 else 2\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // factor\n            act_type = self._to_trtllm_gen_activation_type(self.activation_type)\n            outputs = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n            self.w2_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w2_bias if self.bias else None,\n                self.fc31_scale_c.data,\n                self.fc31_alpha.data,\n                self.fc2_alpha.data,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                act_type=act_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n\n            if not final_hidden_states = outputs[0]\n                # Slice output if it was padded\n                if final_hidden_states.shape[1] > self.hidden_size:\n                    final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_impl(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n        # Get top_k for routing (other routing parameters are extracted inside run_moe)\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n\n        run_post_quant_allgather = (self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n                                    and not self.enable_alltoall)\n        post_quant_comm = run_post_quant_allgather or self.enable_alltoall\n\n        x_sf = None\n        token_selected_experts = None\n        token_final_scales = None\n        token_count = x.shape[0]\n        alltoall_info = None\n        # Determine if this is first/last call (TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't use chunking)\n        is_first_call = self.repeat_idx == 0\n        is_last_call = self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1\n\n        if post_quant_comm:\n            self._load_balancer_start_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = self.routing_method.apply(\n                router_logits)\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_experts.to(torch.int32)\n            if token_final_scales is not None:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n\n            self._load_balancer_done_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            ignore_allreduce = self.enable_alltoall and self.alltoall_method_type in (\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided,\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided,\n            )\n            self._load_balancer_update_statistic(\n                token_selected_experts,\n                is_first_call,\n                is_last_call,\n                ignore_allreduce=ignore_allreduce)\n\n            # Route tokens to slots\n            token_selected_slots = self._load_balancer_route(\n                token_selected_experts, self.use_dp)\n\n            # Update expert statistics\n            ExpertStatistic.set_layer(self.layer_idx)\n            ExpertStatistic.maybe_add_info(self.num_slots, token_selected_slots)\n\n            # Use routed slots for subsequent processing\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_slots\n\n            x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x)\n\n all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else token_count\n\n            if token_final_scales is None:\n                token_final_scales = torch.ones_like(token_selected_experts,\n                                                     dtype=torch.float32)\n            else:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.float32)\n\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                assert self.alltoall_prepare_workspace is not None, \"alltoall_prepare_workspace should be initialized\"\n                if is_last_call:\n self.ep_size,\n                    self.num_experts,\n                    self.num_slots,\n                    top_k,\n                )\n                if gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info.view(\n                        (self.mapping.moe_ep_size, self.num_experts))\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1 else self.repeat_idx + 1\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_fake(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n dim: int = -1) -> torch.Tensor:\n    sizes = x.size()\n    dim = dim % x.dim()\n    assert sizes[dim] % (group_size * 2) == 0\n    prev_sizes = sizes[:dim]\n    post_sizes = sizes[dim + 1:]\n    x =    f\"Pre-reloading weight '{param_name}' requires tensor re-creation, which will invalidate existing CUDA graphs.\"\n            )\n            param = torch.nn.Parameter(torch.empty_like(metadata,\n w3_weight_scale,\n                                           dst_w3_w1_weight: torch.Tensor):\n    w1_weight_scale = w1_weight_scale[...].reshape([])\n    w3_weight_scale = w3_weight_scale[...].reshape([])\n    max_w3_w1_weight_scale = max(w1_weight_scale, w3_weight_scale)\n\n    split_length = module.expand_intermediate_size_per_partition // 2\n    w3_weight =      # It's used to quantize fc31 input inside the MOE op\n        max_fc31_input_scale = module.tmp_fc31_input_scale.max()\n        # max_fc2_input_scale is the maximum of all w2 input scales.\n module.tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale.max(dim=1).values\n        module.fc31_dequant.data.copy_(max_w3_w1_weight_scale *\n                                       max_fc31_input_scale)\n        module.fc2_quant.data.copy_(max_fc2_input_scale.reciprocal())\n        module.fc2_dequant.data.copy_(module.tmp_w2_weight_scale *\n                                      max_fc2_input_scale)\n super().post_load_weights(module)\n\n        # Padding weights to meet FP8 GEMM alignment requirements.\n        def _maybe_padding_weights(tensor: torch.Tensor, row_alignment: int,\n                                   col_alignment: int):\n            row_pad_size = (row_alignment - tensor.size(1)) % row_alignment\n            col_pad_size = (col_alignment - tensor.size(2)) % col_alignment\n            is_padded = row_pad_size != 0 or col_pad_size != 0\n            if is_padded:\n                return F.pad(tensor, (0, col_pad_size, 0, row_pad_size),\n module.rebuild_tensor_metadata)\n            self.setup_quant_scales(module)\n\n\nclass INT8WoqPerChannelFusedMoEMethod(FusedMoEMethodBase):\n\n    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        module.sm_version = get_sm_version()\n        module.sm_version = 80 if module.sm_version >= 90 else module.sm_version\n        module.preprocessor = preprocess_weights_for_mixed_gemm\n\n Got: {module.quant_config.layer_quant_mode}.\"\n            )\n\n        # notice the weight shape for int8 weight-only is different from the original shape,\n        # since the quantized weights    w2_weight_shape)\n\n        self._online_eplb_not_supported(module)\n\n        self.setup_quant_scales(module)\n\n    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n load_expert_w3_w1_weight(self, module: torch.nn.Module,\n                                 w1_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 w3_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 dst_w3_w1_weight: torch.Tensor):\n        \"\"\"\n        Load w1 and w3 weights for each expert.\n        \"\"\"\n        w1_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w1_weight, module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.COLUMN)\n        w3_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w3_weight, module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.COLUMN)\n        w31_weight_shard = torch.cat([w3_weight_shard, w1_weight_shard], dim=0)\n\n        weight_dtype = torch.int8\n\n        assert module.dtype in [torch.float16, torch.bfloat16], \\\n            f\"activation dtype should be float16 or bfloat16, got {module.dtype}\"\n        if not module.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.is_int8_weight_only():\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                f\"weight dtype should be INT8. Got: {module.quant_config.layer_quant_mode}.\"\n            )\n        # preprocess the weights for mixed gemm\n        w31_weight_shard = module.preprocessor(w31_weight_shard.T.contiguous(),\n                                               weight_dtype, module.dtype,\n                                               module.sm_version).contiguous()\n        dst_w3_w1_weight.copy_(w31_weight_shard.view(dst_w3_w1_weight.dtype),\n                               non_blocking=True)\n\n    def load_expert_w2_weight(self, module: torch.nn.Module,\n                              w2_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                              dst_w2_weight: torch.Tensor):\n        \"\"\"\n        Load w2 weight for each expert.\n        \"\"\"\n        w2_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w2_weight, module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.ROW)\n\n        weight_dtype = torch.int8\n        if not module.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.is_int8_weight_only():\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                f\"Weight Only Quantization currently only supports INT8. Got: {module.quant_config.layer_quant_mode}.\"\n            )\n\n        # preprocess the weights for mixed gemm\n        w2_weight_shard = module.preprocessor(w2_weight_shard.T.contiguous(),\n                                              weight_dtype, module.dtype,\n                                              module.sm_version).contiguous()\n        dst_w2_weight.copy_(w2_weight_shard.view(dst_w2_weight.dtype),\n                            non_blocking=True)\n\n    def load_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module, weights: Dict):\n        # fc31 scales\n        all_w3_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale\"],\n                              module.tp_size, module.tp_rank,\n                              TensorParallelMode.COLUMN)\n            for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n        ]\n        all_w1_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale\"],\n                              module.tp_size, module.tp_rank,\n                              TensorParallelMode.COLUMN)\n            for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n        ]\n        w3_w1_scales = torch.cat(\n            [torch.stack(all_w3_scales),\n             torch.stack(all_w1_scales)], dim=-1)\n        w3_w1_scales = w3_w1_scales.to(module.dtype)\n        module.fc31_weight_scale.data.copy_(w3_w1_scales.contiguous())\n\n        # fc2 scales\n        all_w2_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale\"],\n                              module.tp_size, module.tp_rank,\n                              TensorParallelMode.ROW)\n            for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n        ]\n        w2_scales = torch.stack(all_w2_scales).to(module.dtype)\n        module.fc2_weight_scale.data.copy_(w2_scales.contiguous())\n\n\nclass WInt4AFP8FusedMoEMethod(FusedMoEMethodBase):\n\n    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        module.sm_version = get_sm_version()\n        if module.sm_version == 89:\n            module.interleave = [1, 1]\n        elif module.sm_version == 90:\n            module.interleave = []\n            for k_shape in [\n                    module.hidden_size, module.intermediate_size_per_partition\n            ]:\n                if k_shape % 512 == 0:\n                    module.interleave.append(4)\n                elif k_shape % 256 == 0:\n                    module.interleave.append(2)\n                elif k_shape % 128 == 0:\n                    module.interleave.append(1)\n                else:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        f\"K shape is required to be multiple of 128, received {k_shape}.\"\n                    )\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                f\"W4AFP8 MoE is unsupported on SM{module.sm_version}.\")\n        weight_dtype = torch.int8\n        w3_w1_weight_shape = (module.expert_size_per_partition,\n                              module.intermediate_size_per_partition * 2,\n                              module.hidden_size // 2)\n        w2_weight_shape = (module.expert_size_per_partition, module.hidden_size,\n                           module.intermediate_size_per_partition // 2)\n\n        # Multiply act with reciprocal of per-channel pre_quant_scale * per-tensor input_scale\n        fc31_act_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(\n            module.expert_size_per_partition,\n            module.hidden_size,\n            dtype=module.dtype),\n                                      requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_act_scale\", fc31_act_scale)\n\n        fc2_act_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(\n            module.expert_size_per_partition,\n            module.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n            1,\n            dtype=module.dtype),\n                                     requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_act_scale\", fc2_act_scale)\n\n        # col parallel\n        fc31_weight_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(\n            module.expert_size_per_partition,\n            module.hidden_size // (128 * module.interleave[0]),\n            module.intermediate_size_per_partition * 2 * module.interleave[0],\n            dtype=module.dtype),\n                                         requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_weight_scale\", fc31_weight_scale)\n\n        # row parallel\n        fc2_weight_scale = nn.Parameter(\n            torch.empty(module.expert_size_per_partition,\n                        module.intermediate_size_per_partition //\n                        (128 * module.interleave[1]),\n                        module.hidden_size * module.interleave[1],\n                        dtype=module.dtype),\n            requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_weight_scale\", fc2_weight_scale)\n\n        # Multiply W@X with per-tensor weight_scale_2 * per-tensor input_scale.\n        fc31_alpha = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(module.expert_size_per_partition,\n                                              1,\n                                              dtype=torch.float32),\n                                  requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_alpha\", fc31_alpha)\n\n        fc2_alpha = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(module.expert_size_per_partition,\n                                             1,\n                                             dtype=torch.float32),\n                                 requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_alpha\", fc2_alpha)\n\n        super().create_weights(module, weight_dtype, w3_w1_weight_shape,\n                               w2_weight_shape)\n\n        self._online_eplb_not_supported(module)\n\n        self.setup_quant_scales(module)\n\n    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        module.quant_scales = FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8(\n            scale_1_interleaved=module.fc31_weight_scale,\n            scale_2_interleaved=module.fc2_weight_scale,\n            pre_quant_scale_1=module.fc31_act_scale,\n            pre_quant_scale_2=module.fc2_act_scale,\n            zero_1=torch.Tensor(),\n            zero_2=torch.Tensor(),\n            alpha_1=module.fc31_alpha,\n            alpha_2=module.fc2_alpha,\n        )\n\n    def load_expert_w3_w1_weight(self, module: torch.nn.Module,\n                                 w1_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 w3_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 dst_w3_w1_weight: torch.Tensor):\n        \"\"\"\n        Load w1 and w3 weights for each expert.\n        Override this method if you need to preprocess the weights differently.\n        \"\"\"\n        device = dst_w3_w1_weight.device\n        self.device = device\n\n        w1_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w1_weight,\n                                            module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.COLUMN,\n                                            device=device)\n        w3_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w3_weight,\n                                            module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.COLUMN,\n                                            device=device)\n        w31_weight_shard = torch.cat([w3_weight_shard, w1_weight_shard], dim=0)\n\n        packer = torch.ops.trtllm.pack_int8_tensor_to_packed_int4\n        unpacker = torch.ops.trtllm.unpack_int4_packed_tensor_to_int8\n        # SM89\n        if module.sm_version == 89:\n            preprocessor = preprocess_weights_for_mixed_gemm\n\n            w31_weight_shard = packer(\n                unpacker(w31_weight_shard.cpu()).T.contiguous()).to(\n                    w31_weight_shard.device)\n            w31_weight_shard = preprocessor(w31_weight_shard, torch.quint4x2,\n                                            torch.float8_e4m3fn,\n                                            89).view(dst_w3_w1_weight.shape)\n        # SM90 ModelOpt quantized weights\n        elif module.sm_version == 90 and module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n            # Original:  [(N//2)*I4x2, K] which is two int4 elts in output dim packed into one\n            # Transpose: [K, (N//2)*I4x2]\n            transposed = w31_weight_shard.cpu().T.contiguous()\n            # Unpack:    [K, N*I8]\n            unpacked = unpacker(transposed.view(torch.int8))\n            # Transpose: [N, K*I8]\n            transposed = unpacked.T.contiguous()\n            # Pack:      [N, (K//2)*I4x2]\n            w31_weight_shard = packer(transposed)\n        elif module.sm_version == 90 and module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.W4A8_CUSTOM:\n            pass\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                f\"Unsupported configuration: SM{module.sm_version} and {module.weight_loading_mode}.\"\n            )\n\n        dst_w3_w1_weight.copy_(w31_weight_shard.view(dst_w3_w1_weight.dtype),\n                               non_blocking=True)\n\n    def load_expert_w2_weight(self, module: torch.nn.Module,\n                              w2_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                              dst_w2_weight: torch.Tensor):\n        \"\"\"\n        Load w2 weight for each expert.\n        Override this method if you need to preprocess the weights differently.\n        \"\"\"\n        device = dst_w2_weight.device\n        w2_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w2_weight,\n                                            module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.ROW,\n                                            device=device)\n\n        packer = torch.ops.trtllm.pack_int8_tensor_to_packed_int4\n        unpacker = torch.ops.trtllm.unpack_int4_packed_tensor_to_int8\n        if module.sm_version == 89:\n            preprocessor = preprocess_weights_for_mixed_gemm\n\n            w2_weight_shard = packer(\n                unpacker(w2_weight_shard.cpu().contiguous()).T.contiguous()).to(\n                    w2_weight_shard.device)\n            w2_weight_shard = preprocessor(w2_weight_shard, torch.quint4x2,\n                                           torch.float8_e4m3fn,\n                                           89).view(dst_w2_weight.shape)\n        # SM90 ModelOpt quantized weights\n        elif module.sm_version == 90 and module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n            # Original:  [(N//2)*I4x2, K] which is two int4 elts in output dim packed into one\n            # Transpose: [K, (N//2)*I4x2]\n            transposed = w2_weight_shard.cpu().T.contiguous()\n            # Unpack:    [K, N*I8]\n            unpacked = unpacker(transposed.view(torch.int8))\n            # Transpose: [N, K*I8]\n            transposed = unpacked.T.contiguous()\n            # Pack:      [N, (K//2)*I4x2]\n            w2_weight_shard = packer(transposed)\n        elif module.sm_version == 90 and module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.W4A8_CUSTOM:\n            pass\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                f\"Unsupported configuration: SM{module.sm_version} and {module.weight_loading_mode}.\"\n            )\n        dst_w2_weight.copy_(w2_weight_shard.view(dst_w2_weight.dtype),\n                            non_blocking=True)\n\n    def load_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module, weights: Dict):\n        assert self.device.type == \"cuda\"\n\n        # fc31 scales\n        w4a8_custom = module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.W4A8_CUSTOM\n        if w4a8_custom:\n            weight_scale_name = \"weight_scale_inv\"\n        else:\n            weight_scale_name = \"weight_scale\"\n\n        assert (len(module.interleave) == 2)\n\n        # Ensure that the input_scale remains aligned across all ranks for W4A8 custom.\n        input_scale_expert_ids = module.initial_local_expert_ids if not w4a8_custom else range(\n            module.num_experts)\n        # fc31 scales\n        all_w3_input_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.input_scale\"],\n                              device=self.device)\n            for expert_id in input_scale_expert_ids\n        ]\n        all_w1_input_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.input_scale\"],\n                              device=self.device)\n            for expert_id in input_scale_expert_ids\n        ]\n        all_w3_w1_input_scales_max = torch.max(\n            torch.stack(all_w3_input_scales),\n            torch.stack(all_w1_input_scales)).max()\n        if w4a8_custom:\n            # In custom W4A8 ckpt, per-tensor input_scale and per-channel pre_quant_scale are fused into input_scale\n            module.fc31_act_scale.data.copy_(\n                torch.ones_like(module.fc31_act_scale, device=self.device) *\n                (1 / all_w3_w1_input_scales_max))\n            module.fc31_alpha.data.copy_(\n                (torch.ones_like(module.fc31_alpha, device=self.device) *\n                 all_w3_w1_input_scales_max).float())\n        else:\n            # In vanilla ckpt (at least from ModelOpt), per-tensor input_scale and per-channel pre_quant_scale are separately stored\n            all_w3_pre_quant_scales = [\n TensorParallelMode.ROW,\n                                  device=self.device)\n                for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n            ]\n            all_w1_pre_quant_scales = [\n                load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.pre_quant_scale\"],\n                                  module.tp_size,\n                                  module.tp_rank,\n                                  TensorParallelMode.ROW,\n                                  device=self.device)\n                for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n            ]\n            all_w3_w1_pre_quant_scales_greater = torch.max(\n                torch.stack([\n                    torch.stack(all_w3_pre_quant_scales),\n                    torch.stack(all_w1_pre_quant_scales)\n                ]).to(module.dtype),\n                dim=0,\n            ).values.permute(1, 0)\n\n            all_w3_w1_input_scales_greater = torch.max(\n                torch.stack([\n                    torch.stack(all_w3_input_scales),\n                    torch.stack(all_w1_input_scales)\n                ]).to(module.dtype),\n                dim=0,\n            ).values\n\n            all_w3_w1_pre_quant_scales_div_input_scales = (\n                all_w3_w1_pre_quant_scales_greater *\n                (1 / all_w3_w1_input_scales_greater.reshape(\n                    1, module.expert_size_per_partition).float()))\n\n            module.fc31_act_scale.data.copy_(\n                all_w3_w1_pre_quant_scales_div_input_scales.permute(1, 0))\n            # In vanilla ckpt (at least from ModelOpt), per-tensor weight_scale_2 is separately stored\n            all_w3_weight_scale_2 = [\n                load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale_2\"],\n                                  device=self.device)\n                for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n            ]\n            all_w1_weight_scale_2 = [\n                load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale_2\"],\n                                  device=self.device)\n                for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n            ]\n            all_w3_w1_weight_scale_2 = torch.stack([\n                torch.stack(all_w3_weight_scale_2),\n                torch.stack(all_w1_weight_scale_2)\n            ]).to(module.dtype)\n            all_w3_w1_weight_scale_2_greater = torch.max(\n                all_w3_w1_weight_scale_2, dim=0).values\n\n            all_w3_w1_weight_scale_2_mul_input_scales = (\n                all_w3_w1_weight_scale_2_greater.reshape(\n                    module.expert_size_per_partition, 1).float() *\n                all_w3_w1_input_scales_greater.reshape(\n                    module.expert_size_per_partition, 1).float())\n            module.fc31_alpha.data.copy_(\n                all_w3_w1_weight_scale_2_mul_input_scales.reshape(\n                    module.expert_size_per_partition, 1).float())\n\n        # Per-group weight_scale\n        all_w3_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.{weight_scale_name}\"],\n                              module.tp_size,\n                              module.tp_rank,\n                              TensorParallelMode.COLUMN,\n                              device=self.device)\n            for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n        ]\n        all_w1_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.{weight_scale_name}\"],\n                              module.tp_size,\n                              module.tp_rank,\n                              TensorParallelMode.COLUMN,\n                              device=self.device)\n            for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n        ]\n        all_w3_w1_scales = torch.cat(\n            [torch.stack(all_w3_scales),\n             torch.stack(all_w1_scales)], dim=-2)\n        if module.sm_version == 89:\n            w3_w1_scales = all_w3_w1_scales.to(torch.float16).view(module.dtype)\n        else:\n            w3_w1_scales = all_w3_w1_scales.to(torch.bfloat16).view(\n                module.dtype)\n        if module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n            w3_w1_scales = w3_w1_scales.permute(1, 2, 0)\n            w3_w1_scales /= all_w3_w1_weight_scale_2_greater.reshape(\n                module.expert_size_per_partition).float()\n            w3_w1_scales = w3_w1_scales.permute(2, 0, 1)\n\n        w3_w1_s_shape = w3_w1_s_shape[0], w3_w1_s_shape[2] // module.interleave[0],\n            w3_w1_s_shape[1] * module.interleave[0])\n        module.fc31_weight_scale.data.copy_(\n            w3_w1_scales_interleaved.contiguous())\n\n        # fc2 scales\n        all_w2_input_scales = [\n            load_weight_shard(weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.input_scale\"],\n                              device=self.device)\n            for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n        ]\n        all_w2_input_scales_max = torch.stack(all_w2_input_scales).to(\n            module.dtype).max()\n\n        if w4a8_custom:\n            # In custom W4A8 ckpt, per-tensor input_scale and per-channel pre_quant_scale are fused into input_scale\n            module.fc2_act_scale.data.copy_(\n                torch.ones_like(module.fc2_act_scale, device=self.device) *\n                (1 / all_w2_input_scales_max))\n            # In custom W4A8 ckpt, all_w2_input_scales_max).float())\n        else:\n            # In vanilla ckpt (at least from ModelOpt), per-tensor input_scale and per-channel pre_quant_scale are separately stored\n module.tp_rank,\n                                  TensorParallelMode.COLUMN,\n                                  device=self.device)\n                for expert_id in module.initial_local_expert_ids\n            ]\n            all_w2_pre_quant_scales = torch.stack(all_w2_pre_quant_scales).to(\n                module.dtype)\n            all_w2_input_scales = torch.stack(all_w2_input_scales).to(\n                module.dtype)\n            all_w2_pre_quant_scales_div_input_scales = (\n                all_w2_pre_quant_scales.permute(1, 0) *\n                (1 / (all_w2_input_scales.reshape(\n                    module.expert_size_per_partition).float()))).permute(1, 0)\n            module.fc2_act_scale.data.copy_(\n                all_w2_pre_quant_scales_div_input_scales.reshape(\n                    module.fc2_act_scale.shape))\n            # In vanilla ckpt (at least from ModelOpt), per-tensor weight_scale_2 is separately stored\n            all_w2_weight_scale_2 = [\n
